original: It took you this long to find a goddamn shotgun? It’s pretty rudimentary in design, just a quick and easy breech that you can thumb a pair of shells into. The real quality is what you want to load into it - with a thick gauge, as long as you have enough time to prepare, this’ll put the hurt on anything. Just... do it slowly, sausagefingers.
context: <<POS:06101461>> n="a trench shotgun",e.tooltip='It took you this long to find a goddamn shotgun? It’s pretty'
